     The Numbers Business Report

Office Christmas Party (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $54,767,494Details
International Box Office $60,330,380
Worldwide Box Office $115,097,874
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,561,574
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,696,706
Total $5,258,280
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When a CEO tries to close her hard-partying brother’s branch, he and his Chief Technical Officer must rally their co-workers and host an epic office Christmas party in an effort to impress a potential client and close a sale that will save their jobs.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$16,890,204 (30.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.24 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$45,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,210 opening theaters/3,210 max. theaters, 3.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $75,480,493

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 9th, 2016 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: December 8th, 2016 (Wide) (Netherlands)
December 9th, 2016 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
December 9th, 2016 (Wide) (Argentina)
December 9th, 2016 (Wide) (Germany)
December 9th, 2016 (Wide) (Poland)
Video Release: March 21st, 2017 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for crude sexual content and language throughout, drug use and graphic nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2452 (Cert #50691), 11/23/2016)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Plot point: Black Out Drunk, Dysfunctional Family, Narcotics, Parties Gone Wild, Sibling Rivalry
Social setting: Christmas, Corporate Life
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Pictures, Reliance Entertainment, Bluegrass Films, Entertainment 360
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
